title: Reproduce complete Durable Ledger State
preconditions: Representative Ledger containing every durable state type, including category hierarchy/moves, evidence, exact and corrected statement reconciliation, replacement, dimension carry-forward or unknown initialization, relationship replacement, exceptions, pools, payment attribution, assigned/unassigned cases, active/retired history, and exact baselines.
steps: Create and verify a backup; restore into an empty generation; compare manifests, counts, hierarchy ancestry, transaction/dimension/relationship replacement chains, evidence/decision links, assignments, exact direct/subtree/pool totals, history, cardinality, and idempotency; activate; repeat with corrupt, cyclic, incomplete, incompatible, and faulted candidates.
expected: A valid restore reproduces the complete authoritative current and historical state exactly; invalid hierarchy, replacement, carry-forward, link, total, permission, checksum, schema, or policy state fails before activation and leaves the prior generation current.
